title: FluxTube — quota burn rate too high

annotations.summary: Total YouTube quota burn over the last 24h exceeds 8000 units.
annotations.description: The Worker aborts a single run at 8000 units, but cumulative burn approaching the 10k/day default cap means a future run could hit the daily limit. Check what's eating quota — usually a flood of new entries triggering many `playlistItems.insert` (50 units each). The `HEARTBEAT_URL_QUOTA` check fires immediately on the actual `FatalError`; this rule is a softer trend warning.
